blockers: Complete current primary-source and search-landscape research
Validate independent purpose and portfolio differentiation
Assign accountable owners and required reviewers
Specify original utility, launch content graph, conversion, and operating model
Pass all authority and indexability gates
Complete current business-specific research and source verification.
Approve independent purpose, portfolio differentiation, and query/entity ownership.
Assign and obtain required qualified domain review.
Complete original utility, content graph, conversion, operating model, and all mandatory gates.

excluded_page_patterns: Token-swapped location, role, industry, regulation, or keyword pages
Pages without unique purpose, evidence, ownership, maintenance, and indexability decisions

prohibited_content: Fabricated proof, experts, credentials, results, clients, reviews, or statistics
Scaled or doorway content created primarily for search rankings
Superficial rewriting without substantial original value

utilities.name: Readiness, risk, or completeness assessment
utilities.purpose: Provide defensible value beyond informational content

conversion.primary_action: To be determined from business model and audience intent
ethical_constraints: No fake urgency, deceptive scarcity, confirm-shaming, hidden fees, or preselected consent
Collect only data necessary for the stated purpose

proof_policy: Only genuine, permissioned proof may be presented as real
Pre-launch proof slots must be visibly labeled placeholder or illustrative

canonical_policy: Every indexable URL has one absolute HTTPS self-referencing canonical unless an approved equivalent owns the canonical.
Canonical targets must return 200, remain indexable, and not redirect.
robots_policy: Generated and review environments remain noindex
Keep generated, review, and incomplete surfaces noindex.
Do not block resources required to render or evaluate public content.
sitemap_profiles: separate image/video/news sitemaps only when the content type exists
redirect_policy: Use one-hop permanent redirects only for genuine replacements.
Never redirect unrelated retired content to the homepage.
structured_data: Article or Service when visible content supports it

requirements: Manual and assistive-technology review for critical flows
Core Web Vitals lab and real-user monitoring
Search, content, utility, lead, conversion, and quality dashboards
Legitimate expert, media, association, partnership, review, and reputation activity
